commit_scope: Add the generic physical sensor organ channel contract and bridge Android active summary rows into it.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/obs-verify.fk form-stdlib/trust-decay.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-field.fk form-stdlib/persistence.fk form-stdlib/world-module-model.fk form-stdlib/world-model-growth.fk form-stdlib/organ-reading.fk form-stdlib/sensor-organ-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/sensor-organ-channel-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/obs-verify.fk form-stdlib/trust-decay.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-field.fk form-stdlib/persistence.fk form-stdlib/world-module-model.fk form-stdlib/world-model-growth.fk form-stdlib/organ-reading.fk form-stdlib/sensor-organ-channel.fk form-stdlib/sensor-organ-android-bridge.fk form-stdlib/tests/sensor-organ-android-bridge-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh sensor-organ-channel sensor-organ-android-bridge
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed in continuation mode after the branch was rebased on origin/main. Wellness stayed aligned for maps, circulation, source maps, and durable-doc self-forgiveness, with unrelated attention on the Windows Python alias, the active liteparse-pdf-native target symbol, and the public kernel-first probe. sensor-organ-channel-band returned 4095 on Go/Rust/TS only. sensor-organ-android-bridge-band returned 4095 on Go/Rust/TS only. A concrete fourth-arm gate attempt with temporary manifest rows returned NO-FOURTH for both new stems. Fourth-arm gap: local Windows fkwu build is unavailable in this worktree because the local compiler path is missing clang and the temporary gcc shim failed while building the emitted fkwu C before reaching these bands.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy was performed before this local evidence record.

phase_gate.gate: Physical sensing organs must publish confidence, freshness, privacy, frame, trace, and composite observation receipts through one Form-native contract before adding more device-specific carriers.
phase_gate.next: Restore the local fkwu compiler path or run the focused fourth-arm gate on a host that can build fkwu, then register the bands only after the fourth leg returns a matching verdict.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Generic physical sensor samples can now lower into the shared organ-reading stream with explicit privacy and provenance. Existing Android active mic RMS, camera luma, and GPU readback summary rows can lower through that same contract and compose into an android-active-media observation without storing raw audio, frames, or GPU buffers.
test_flows: Fresh high-confidence derived samples become observed organ readings.
Stale samples and raw-private samples are withheld from mesh-safe use.
Motion mode composes speed, cadence, vertical motion, acceleration, and GPS/IMU/barometer/magnetometer confidence.
Android mic, camera, and GPU active summary rows lower into generic sensor samples.
The Android active media composite becomes observed only when the required summary lanes are present and usable.
e2e_validation.summary: The shipped floor is a generic sensor organ channel plus an Android active-sample bridge, proven locally across Go/Rust/TypeScript.
